blockingIssues.description: Out-of-scope change committed to generated file `web/next-env.d.ts` (line 3). The feature scope was CSS/Tailwind-only, and this file explicitly says it should not be edited.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit evidence of both lint and typecheck command execution in the handoff verification section whenever the skill mandates both validators.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature review found `followedProcedure=true` but transcript skeleton only showed `pnpm --filter web typecheck` and no lint command.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add concrete `agent-browser` command examples (session naming and screenshot workflow) to reduce invalid-command churn during visual validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Transcript skeleton showed an initial invalid `agent-browser ... launch` attempt before usage was discovered via help.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance to avoid committing framework-generated files (for example `next-env.d.ts`) unless the task specifically requires it.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewed feature commit included generated-file churn outside the requested CSS/Tailwind scope.
